finding_results.notes: Noor now reaches the cafeteria corridor in the same scene, directly sees the wounded raider, watches Lena's people finish the kill, and sees the body dragged to Stairwell A.
Marcus's relay-message reaction is rebuilt around Julie, Maddie, and the garage door without repeating the style-bible calibration cadence.
The cafeteria death is no longer secondhand. Noor witnesses the wounds, the bleed-out, the body position, the smell, the sound of blood on tile, and the disposal into the stairwell.
The Marcus dialogue now avoids the old statement-identification-repetition structure and shifts into concrete family detail instead.
The earlier hand-inventory echo is gone. Chapter 8 keeps only one primary-cluster rack callback and moves the rest of the infrastructure beat onto the secondary-cluster reveal.
Marcus's withdrawal is now concentrated into four main beats: initial state and vomiting, the HVAC cramp, the degraded cluster reveal, and the effort required to get upright for the relay message.
The fluorescent-light description has been rewritten and no longer repeats the earlier 'without warmth' or 'without variation' phrasing.
Post-revision check puts Chapter 8 at zero prose lines with em-dashes.
Post-revision sentence-start check puts the chapter at 11 'She' openers, well under the packet threshold.
Vague 'something' placeholders were replaced with named observations; post-revision count is zero.

summary: Chapter 8 was structurally revised to bring the cafeteria raid and death fully onto the page through Noor's direct perception, while preserving the chapter's planned engine: Marcus's withdrawal, the secondary-cluster reveal, Lena's control of the dock, and the family-message rupture. The Marcus relay beat was rebuilt to avoid the style-bible echo, withdrawal proof was compressed into four concentrated passages, and the chapter-level prose tics flagged in the packet were reduced below threshold.
